region: Van Nuys, CA 91405 / Los Angeles-San Fernando Valley
note: Expanded from 150 to all 531 groceryData items and calibrated for Van Nuys ZIP 91405. Prices are best-effort public-web anchored estimates for app suggestions, not guaranteed live checkout prices; loyalty-card discounts, sales, taxes, substitutions, delivery markups, and stock vary by store.
method: Hybrid update: direct public web anchors for major grocery staples and nearby/store-specific pages; BLS Los Angeles March 2026 CPI and BLS average retail food price data for category calibration; USDA ERS 2026 Food Price Outlook for category trend direction; original starter values retained where reasonable; remaining long-tail items modeled by product family, typical package, store format, and 91405 chain positioning.

pricingSources.name: BLS Average price data selected food items March 2026
pricingSources.usedFor: national staple price anchors: milk, eggs, bread, bananas, tomatoes, chicken, ground chuck

pricingSources.name: USDA ERS Food Price Outlook 2026
pricingSources.usedFor: category trend direction for beef, poultry, dairy, eggs, produce, beverages

pricingSources.name: Official Walmart public product/category pages
pricingSources.usedFor: Walmart anchors for milk, eggs, cheese, chicken

pricingSources.name: Official Target public grocery pages
pricingSources.usedFor: Target anchors for milk, eggs, dairy, chicken

pricingSources.name: Official Ralphs/Food 4 Less public search and weekly-ad pages
pricingSources.usedFor: Kroger-family local grocery anchor and weekly deal availability

pricingSources.name: TraderJoesPrices.com and Trader Joe's product pages
pricingSources.usedFor: Trader Joe's public/private-label price anchor where available

pricingSources.name: ALDI official weekly specials and California location pages
pricingSources.usedFor: ALDI discount/produce anchors and Southern California availability

pricingSources.name: Costco Van Nuys warehouse page
pricingSources.usedFor: Costco local store presence and bulk-format adjustment
